plugins.name: aws
plugins.description: Collect invoices from AWS Billing Console. Supports root account login with optional TOTP 2FA.
plugins.author: msee-dev

plugins.name: hetzner
plugins.description: Collect invoices from Hetzner Cloud Console. Supports accounts.hetzner.com login with optional TOTP.
plugins.author: msee-dev

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Collect invoices from GitHub organization billing. Supports login with TOTP and navigates payment history.
plugins.author: msee-dev

plugins.name: cursor
plugins.description: Collect invoices from Cursor IDE via Stripe billing portal. Authenticates through WorkOS AuthKit.
plugins.author: msee-dev

plugins.description: Collect invoices from Google Cloud Console billing. Supports Google account login with optional TOTP.
